creator: glebius@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi!

Can you please evaluate this patch queue:

https://reviews.freebsd.org/D40068
https://reviews.freebsd.org/D40069
https://reviews.freebsd.org/D40070

It will not prevent from DNS lookups if you use DNS names in your hosts.allow neither if you use keywords like KNOWN or LOCAL in there. But it will prevent and DNS lookups if the hosts.allow is based on IP addresses or prefixes.
